analysis.reasoning: Core message: A congratulatory note to India's foreign service, praising Russia–India strategic partnership across bilateral relations and cooperation on international platforms. Evaluation by narrative: RU1 (West immoral/hostile) – Not present; no mention of the West or decadence. RU2 (Russia leads an alternative system) – Implicitly aligns with non-Western cooperation and multilateral platforms, but the tweet does not explicitly position Russia as leading or promoting an alternative system; it's generic appreciation. Insufficient to claim RU2. RU3 (Russia is a benevolent partner) – Yes; it emphasizes partnership, appreciation, and cooperation, portraying Russia as a friendly, reliable partner. RU4 (Russian history admirable) – Not relevant. RU5 (Russia at the forefront) – Not claimed. RU6 (Interesting culture/nature) – Not relevant. Conclusion: The tweet promotes RU3 only.
